summary: Tested Arabic RTL POS system shift management features. All requested features verified working: 1) Shift badge in header shows 'الوردية: كاشير تجريبي' and is clickable, 2) Cashier selection dialog shows only active cashiers with green 'نشط' badge, 3) Backend cashiers-list API returns has_active_shift field, 4) renderClosingReceiptBitmap function exists and is used for closing receipt, 5) Owner is released from shift after register close.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js line 11: import { renderClosingReceiptBitmap } from '../utils/receiptBitmap' - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js lines 1347-1354: printClosingReceiptViaUSB uses renderClosingReceiptBitmap for bitmap rendering - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js lines 1010-1018: Owner released from shift after register close (setActiveShift(null)) - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js lines 504-540: openShiftForCashier with 60s timeout for owner - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js lines 2719-2799: Cashier selection dialog filters to show only active cashiers (has_active_shift) - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js lines 1984-2003: Shift badge is a clickable Button with data-testid='active-shift-badge' - VERIFIED
receiptBitmap.js lines 717-819: renderClosingReceiptBitmap function exported - VERIFIED
shifts_routes.py lines 147-173: cashiers-list endpoint returns has_active_shift boolean for each cashier - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing shift for 'كاشير تجريبي'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All shift management features verified working. Current open shift is for 'كاشير تجريبي' (cashier_id: 29d01373-293c-4703-8c4f-2f832d9d2abb). The shift badge in header is clickable and opens cashier selection dialog. Dialog shows only active cashiers with green 'نشط' badge. renderClosingReceiptBitmap is used for closing receipt bitmap rendering instead of raw ESC/POS text.
verified_features: Dashboard loads correctly with Arabic RTL layout
Shift badge in header shows 'الوردية: كاشير تجريبي'
Shift badge is clickable (Button component with data-testid='active-shift-badge')
Clicking shift badge opens cashier selection dialog
Cashier selection dialog title: 'اختيار وردية كاشير'
Dialog shows only active cashiers (filtered by has_active_shift)
GET /api/shifts/cashiers-list returns has_active_shift field for each cashier
Owner is released from shift after register close (setActiveShift(null))
Close register dialog shows denomination fields and expected cash
No-cash button visible when all denominations are 0
Confirm button present in close register dialog

code_verification.bitmap_usage: Dashboard.js line 1347: const bitmapResult = renderClosingReceiptBitmap({...data, restaurantName, branchName, cashierName, dateStr, timeStr})
code_verification.active_cashiers_filter: Dashboard.js line 2729: const activeCashiers = cashiersList.filter(c => c.has_active_shift)
code_verification.cashiers_list_api: shifts_routes.py lines 164-172: cashier['has_active_shift'] = active_shift is not None
